title: ROC RESALE - 211info
text: REACHING OUR COMMUNITY ROC RESALE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with used clothing and toys. Accepts donations of gently used clothing and toys. Clothing vouchers are available. 564 SW Foundry Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing Vouchers: Women and children Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Email (541) 476-3344 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 476-3344 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Thrift Store: Walk in or visit website for more information Clothing Vouchers: Referral from community partner FEES: Thrift Store: Varies by item Clothing Vouchers: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Clothing Donation Programs Clothing Vouchers Holiday Gifts/Toys Thrift Shops Toy/Game Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - ROC FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
